description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban streetwear, featuring a loose-fitting button-up shirt with short sleeves and a long undershirt, paired with baggy pants. He wears a baseball cap pulled low over his face, obscuring his eyes, and sports a full beard. His outfit is accessorized with a wristwatch on his left wrist and a necklace. The shoes are chunky and athletic in style, complementing the overall casual, street-inspired look. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and his stance is relaxed, suggesting a neutral pose.
description: An adult male in urban streetwear with a cap, baggy clothes, and accessories, standing with arms outstretched. The look is casual and street-inspired.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cap, beard, necklace, wristwatch, and full details of the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, beard, and the watch on the left wrist.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt and pants, with arms outstretched and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the cap, beard, and the right arm without visible accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a button-up shirt, long undershirt, baggy pants, and a baseball cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by a cap with a full beard
